Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

It is a bit problematic IMHO that the server cannot gracefully handle being sent a larger buffer size or count. Before we had "pills" we could always increase the size of the RPC buffers to add new features.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Fixed the issue I see with 2.10 clients. Thanks.

commit.subject: LU-11375 mdc: use old statfs format
commit.message:
LU-11375 mdc: use old statfs format

when the client talks to old server with no support
for aggregated statfs
